meaning: n.[昆]沙螽(新西兰产长须无翅大蝗)
examples: So WETA is basically changing all the rules with motion capture.
Weta Digital is named after the Giant Weta, the heaviest insect in the world.
Weta workshop enlarged it, but Peter Jackson wanted it bigger, so they made it bigger.
The director is collaborating with Weta Digital to develop an underwater motion capture system.
The Public Broadcasting Service and its Washington flagship station, WETA, refused to air this film.
